breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Author's Own Checklist: We Adopted 3 of 5 — Here's What Changed
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome author published a five-item 'What A Fair Auditor Should Actually Test' checklist. New Part 8b documents our point-by-point response: 3 items fully adopted, 1 partially, 1 rejected with reasoned alternative. Concrete before/after examples from our own data.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: API vs Homepage: Three Different 'Confirmed' Counts from the Same Site
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: New Part 4.2 catalogs six places where the dome's machine-readable API (methodology.json, claim_index.json) concedes things the visible '69 Confirmed / 94.5%' headline doesn't reflect. Most striking: three publications of 'prospective_confirmed' count disagree — 10 / 9 / 1.
